chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1709 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution 27.4.2026 Mr. Athar Hussain advocate for the petitioner --------------------- Learned counsel under instructions does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
